form.formComment: On a three run winning streak. Last start favourite; ran on from midfield and scored a big 7 len win at Sanliurfa March 30 over 1900m defeating Caputhan with 58kg at $1.10. The start before that favourite; came from midfield and scored a big 4.5 len win at Sanliurfa March 11 over 1700m defeating Kanatli Oglu with 56kg at $1.65. Ideally placed to play a significant role.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 33-day let-up. Last start 2nd of 8 at Yesiloba All Weather in G3 on March 10 over 1400m, 0.1 len behind Sergokce carrying 58kg at $11.50.
